# InQsi

InQsi is a sports market intelligence web application.

Purpose:
- Review sports market movement
- Organize game signal context
- Show data availability clearly
- Support watchlists and alerts
- Provide dashboard history when verified records are available

Primary message:
Sports market intelligence for sharper review.

Public routes:
- /
- /sports
- /picks-audit
- /predicted-winners
- /best-lines
- /parlay-scanner
- /live-market
- /performance
- /methodology
- /pricing

Data policy:
If verified data is unavailable, InQsi shows Working on it.
